Military service is indicated by the Sun in Aries or Scorpio aspected
by Mars; the Sun or Mars in Capricorn or Aquarius aspected by Saturn;
the Moon in cancer or Pisces. The Sun in Aries aspected by Jupiter in
Leo and sagittarius with Martian connections; Mars in one of his own
signs aspected by the Sun and in a sign of venus aspec:ted by Venus;
